features: 6 x Febreze Air Mist Vanilla Magnolia 185ml
6 x Febreze Air Mist Vanilla and Magnolia : Comforting vanilla and creamy woods with notes of white floral and powder.
Directions : Do not shake the can and hold upright for an optimal spray. Spray it all around the house to fight odours and freshen.
description: Febreze Air Mist Vanilla & Magnolia – Pack of 6 Transform your home with the soothing scent of Febreze Air Mist Vanilla & Magnolia . This elegant fragrance blends comforting vanilla, creamy woods, and soft white florals with a hint of powder, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere in any room. Powered by OdourClear Technology , Febreze doesn’t just mask odours – it eliminates them, leaving behind a clean, long-lasting freshness. Perfect for use in: living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, hallways, and more. A gentle spray is all you need to freshen up your space with ease. Includes: 6 x 300ml Febreze Air Mist Vanilla & Magnolia
